conceptExplanation.en: OF20 — To express opinions about people. Source document SC102-2/20-2005F. Grammar taught: adjectives, agreement. Vocabulary: the OF20 section of the PFL2 Lexique. 67 questions, all traceable to the PFL2 source (6 verbatim source activities + 61 from the OF20 Lexique).
